name: AndersMattsonGolf
about: AndersMattsonGolf is a golf training studio established in 2019, focused on providing coaching services to the Saratoga Springs community. It utilizes a holistic approach to player development for adults, families, and youths, combining state-of-the-art technology with traditional golf values. The facility, known as the Saratoga Golf Studio, serves as a year-round training hub where students have access to mentorship and advanced equipment to advance their skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan launch monitor and simulator technology for data-driven fitting and instruction
Comprehensive club fitting services with a wide selection of premium clubs like Vokey and Scotty Cameron
Structured coaching programs for both adults and juniors with a focus on holistic player development

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fitting, launch condition optimization, and virtual leagues.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can use your own clubs, the facility offers club fitting services with a selection of premium clubs like Vokey and Scotty Cameron. They also accept used club donations for junior players.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the website does not mention any food or drink service, so bringing outside items may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes on a simulator is not specified, but typical simulator sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, AndersMattsonGolf has dedicated junior programs, including a Junior Golf Academy, and actively supports junior golfers through training and equipment donations.
